evidence_references.quote: 기타 명시된 뇌혈관질환(I678) 진단에 따른 보험금 청구

warnings: case_type=진단·수술비: the claim is a fixed-benefit diagnosis claim (뇌혈관질환진단비, a 진단비 특약), clearly within the 진단·수술비 taxonomy. No disability (후유장해), indemnity/실손, or liability (배상책임) elements are present, so secondary_case_types is empty — this is a single clean case type.

The claim was denied (부지급/면책) by all three insurers, but denial status is orthogonal to case_type (which classifies the claim's nature for template selection); denial reasons are handled by the denial-response/denial-validation stages, not here.

template_id 'template_진단수술비_v1' is a provisional value: per pipeline.md and open-decisions.md #2, the required sections per case_type's template_id are not yet defined and document-assembly does not yet enforce anything against this value.
